$schema_note: Phase 1 — staging/production deployment, backups, monitoring, and the go-live gate. This is the last work package before Phase 1 is 'done' — nothing here should start until the core modules (02-06) are feature-complete and P1.QA/P1.SEC crosscutting gates (07) are green.

work_packages.name: Staging Environment & UAT
work_packages.goal: UAT mirror of production; Department Admin sign-off gate before any production deploy.

tasks.title: Stand up staging stack
tasks.description: Same docker-compose topology as production, separate host/subdomain; real OSAS sandbox credentials if available, otherwise mock.
tasks.notes: Needs a second host/subdomain — see SystemDefinition5.txt §8.

tasks.title: Seed staging with anonymized/demo data
tasks.description: Anonymized copy or full seed; wiped per release cycle.

tasks.title: Department Admin UAT sign-off checklist
tasks.description: Formal gate: staging must be signed off by Department Admin before production deploy proceeds.

work_packages.name: Production Hardening & Go-Live
work_packages.goal: Production environment hardened per deployment-definition.json, backups/DR verified, monitoring live, launch executed.

tasks.title: Production hardening checklist
tasks.description: NODE_ENV=production, debug/seed routes disabled, CORS locked to portal origin, DB user least-privilege grants, append-only permissions for audit tables.

tasks.title: Backups: nightly pg_dump + offsite copy
tasks.description: Encrypted daily dumps (02:30), 30-day local retention + weekly offsite; object storage upload versioning + weekly sync verification.
acceptance_criteria: A restore has actually been tested, not just assumed to work (see P1.DEVOPS.PROD05)
tasks.notes: Needs object storage provider decided — see SystemDefinition5.txt §9.

tasks.title: Monitoring & alerting
tasks.description: /healthz probed every 60s by an uptime monitor; pino JSON logs → docker log driver (+ optional Loki/Grafana); metrics: scan latency p95, 5xx rate, open sessions count, OSAS sync outcomes, DB pool saturation; alerts: healthz failures (2 consecutive), OSAS sync FAILED, error rate spike, disk >80%, cert expiry <14 days.
tasks.notes: Monitoring tool + alert channel choice — see SystemDefinition5.txt §11.

tasks.title: Rollback procedure verified
tasks.description: docker compose pull previous tag → up -d → verify /healthz; confirm migrations are actually forward-compatible for the release being shipped.

tasks.title: Restore drill from a real backup
tasks.description: Stop api → restore latest dump via restore script → prisma migrate status check → start api → verify healthz + spot-check attendance data. RPO 24h, RTO 4h targets.
deliverables: Drill executed once before go-live; scheduled once/semester thereafter
acceptance_criteria: RTO 4h target actually met in the drill, not assumed

tasks.title: Go-live checklist + launch execution
tasks.description: Merge to main → CI deploys → verify /healthz + one live scan in staging-mode smoke → announce via maintenance banner if downtime expected.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 E2E critical journeys pass against production immediately post-launch

work_packages.name: Documentation & Handoff
work_packages.goal: README/definition_data kept current, ops log started, .env.example current, admin/faculty user guides ready before classes start.

tasks.title: Admin & faculty user guides
tasks.description: Refreshed each semester before classes start; format per SystemDefinition5.txt §14 answer (in-app help / PDF / video).

tasks.title: Ops log + incident-response process live
tasks.description: SEV1/2/3 severities, escalation process, postmortem template ready before go-live.

tasks.title: Definition-sync PR checklist item
tasks.description: Any behavior change must update the definition files (SystemDefinition*.json, definition_data/**) in the same PR — add as a PR template checkbox.
